book.occultism.dictionary_of_spirits.pen: Recent discoveries into the occult have manifested the Crystalline Infusion Altar. Further research into the altar has revealed two primary functions, Crystal Infusion and Crystalline Transmutation.

The first function of the altar is Crystalline Infusion. The altar is able to channel mystic energies of the occult into crystalline items granting them unique properties. On further observation, after infusion crystalline items are able to act as catalyst items to summon meteors.

The second function of the altar is Crystalline Transmutation. The mystic energies channeled by the altar can be harnessed to rearrange the atomic structure of crystalline items. This process can grant access to normally unobtainable or rare crystalline items.
